name: Borderwatch started
description: Fighter OP route has started at Borderwatch Outpost.

name: Borderwatch supplies checked
description: Initial equipment and supplies were checked.

name: Vernworth reached
description: Player reached Vernworth for the first power-base phase.

name: Melve reached
description: Player reached Melve during the early route.

name: Melve secured
description: Melve is established as a known early route stop.

name: Vernworth reached
description: Player reached Vernworth and can use it as first main hub.

name: Vernworth base ready
description: Essential Vernworth prep step has been completed.

name: Roderick spoken to
description: Roderick has provided the Trevo Mine lead for Vocation Frustration.

name: Vocation Frustration active
description: Vocation Frustration has been accepted/activated.

name: Trevo Mine prepared
description: Player is prepared for Trevo Mine with party and supplies.

name: Trevo Mine reached
description: Player reached Trevo Mine.

name: Trevo Mine entered
description: Player entered Trevo Mine.

name: Trevo Mine cleared
description: Trevo Mine route enemies were cleared enough for safe looting.

name: Two-Hander obtained
description: Two-Hander greatsword has been obtained.

name: Grievous Horns obtained
description: Grievous Horns archistaff has been obtained.

name: Trevo Mine exited
description: Player left Trevo Mine after collecting key items.

name: Vocation Frustration turn-in ready
description: Both required weapons are ready to be returned to Klaus.

name: Warrior unlocked
description: Warrior vocation is available after turning in a greatsword.

name: Sorcerer unlocked
description: Sorcerer vocation is available after turning in an archistaff.

name: Vocation Frustration completed
description: Vocation Frustration route objective is complete.

name: First OP spike complete
description: First route milestone completed: Vernworth + Warrior/Sorcerer unlock.
